allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Initial commit: Graph-RAG with Streamlit UI

Features:
- Streamlit web interface with PDF/text file upload
- Automatic knowledge graph construction using LLMGraphTransformer
- Neo4j graph database integration
- PGVector for vector embeddings
- Dual visualization engines (Streamlit-Agraph & Pyvis)
- Node type auto-detection and color-coding
- Interactive filters and graph exploration
- Existing graph auto-detection and restore
- Azure OpenAI integration

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
Bash(git -C "c:\work\RAG\graphrag" add app.py networkx_graph.py llm_factory.py db_utils.py requirements.txt README.md "課題メモ.md")

Bash(git -C "c:\work\RAG\graphrag" commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Add resume feature and VLLM improvements

Features:
- Resume functionality for knowledge graph processing
  - Chunk-by-chunk DB save with processed hash tracking
  - New/Resume build buttons in UI
- VLLM LLMGraphTransformer fix (remove custom prompt)
- Progress bar for graph generation
- Update UI examples to generic terms

Files:
- app.py: Resume logic, progress bar, VLLM config
- networkx_graph.py: Processed hash management methods
- llm_factory.py: VLLM ChatOpenAI integration
- Remove vllm_client.py (replaced by ChatOpenAI)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git -C "c:\work\RAG\graphrag" commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Add max_nodes slider fix and connection timeout improvements

Features:
- max_nodes slider now updates graph display dynamically
- Connection timeout (30s) and retry logic for PGVector
- New CLI tool (build_kg.py) for batch processing
- New diagnostic script (check_pg_connection.py)

Fixes:
- Slider change detection clears graph cache properly
- Partial display mode works after slider change (del vs None)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git -C "c:\work\RAG\graphrag" commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Add modern UI styling with custom CSS

- Gradient accent colors (blue-purple theme)
- Dark sidebar with gradient background
- Rounded buttons with hover effects
- Card-style expanders and metrics
- Styled tabs, inputs, progress bars, scrollbars
- Inter font for modern typography
- No functionality changes

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git -C "c:\work\RAG\graphrag" commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Always run document search + replace ts_rank with BM25

- Document search now always runs (not just as fallback when graph
  has no source chunks). Graph source chunks are merged with dedup.
- Replace PostgreSQL ts_rank (TF-IDF) with rank-bm25 (BM25Okapi)
  for keyword scoring. PostgreSQL ts_rank remains as pre-filter
  to fetch candidates, Python-side BM25 does final ranking.
- RRF hybrid now computed in Python (BM25 + vector rank fusion)
- Both retriever_and_merge locations updated (NetworkX + Neo4j paths)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
Bash(git -C "c:\work\RAG\graphrag" add app.py build_kg.py graphrag.py hybrid_retriever.py networkx_graph.py chunk_utils.py prompt.py)
